scripts.generate:api-map: node scripts/generate-brokerage-openapi.mjs && node scripts/generate-unified-api-map.mjs && node scripts/generate-brokerage-markdown.mjs && node scripts/generate-brokerage-curl.mjs && node scripts/generate-endpoint-markdown.mjs
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @zaydiscold/robinhood-cli typecheck && pnpm --filter @zaydiscold/robinhood-cli build && pnpm --filter @zaydiscold/robinhood-cli-mcp typecheck
